summary: Admin Dashboard operational control center testing - All 8+ sections verified working correctly. Backend API /api/rbac/dashboard-stats returns tournaments, matches, predictions keys. Frontend displays all sections with correct KPIs and color-coded action badges in audit log.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend API /api/rbac/dashboard-stats returns all required keys: users, leagues, tournaments, matches, predictions, matchdays, payments, audit
VERIFIED: Allarmi Critici section shows tournament alerts (e.g. 'Nessun partecipante') and match alerts (e.g. 'partite con stato inconsistente')
VERIFIED: Tornei section shows all 6 counters: Totale, Attivi, Round Live, Completati, Pending, A Rischio
VERIFIED: Stato Partite section shows: Oggi, Live ora, Senza risultato, Inconsistenti
VERIFIED: Attivita Pronostici section shows: Totale, Oggi, Giornate attive, Leghe, Tornei
VERIFIED: Pagamenti section shows: Pending, Oggi, Ultimi 7gg, Totale incassato, Falliti + recent payments table
VERIFIED: Attivita Recente section has 'Vedi tutto' link and color-coded action badges (CREATE green, DELETE red, UPDATE blue, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard at /api/admin-ui fully tested. All 8+ sections verified: Allarmi Critici (with tournament and match alerts), Utenti, Leghe, Tornei (6 counters), Stato Partite (4 counters), Attivita Pronostici (5 counters), Giornate, Pagamenti (5 counters + table), Attivita Recente (with Vedi tutto link and color-coded badges). Backend API dashboard-stats returns all expected keys.

verified_features.critical_alarms_match_alerts: PASS - Shows '40 partite con stato inconsistente'
